programme.title: The Great British Baking Show: Patisserie

programme.title: Nature: Primates: Secrets of Survival

programme.title: Nova: Building Wonders: Colosseum - Roman Death Trap

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead: Abandoning the Titanic

programme.title: Movie: Sweet Home Alabama

programme.title: Movie: The Proposal

programme.title: WWE NXT
programme.desc: A unique acrobatic and theatrically aggressive presentation of wrestling.

programme.title: Movie: X-Men: The Last Stand
programme.desc: A cure to make mutants normal is discovered using the DNA of a very powerful boy.

programme.title: Modern Family: iSpy

programme.title: Modern Family: The Feud

programme.title: Modern Family: Spring-a-Ding-Fling

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Search and Destroy

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Killshot

programme.title: Dateline: Mystery at Ascot Estates

programme.title: Dateline: Broken Bonds

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Keepin' It Real

programme.desc: Cleaning tips and garbage disposal; motor maintenance; home generators; loan advice.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Around the Corner
programme.desc: A woman with good intentions to save a bookstore clashes with the owner who has lost his Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Movie: A Gift Wrapped Christmas
programme.desc: Personal shopper Gwen's new client Charlie is a workaholic, single father. When Gwen sees how little time Charlie spends with his son, she makes it her Christmas mission to get Charlie into the holiday spirit and appreciate the family he has.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in the City
programme.desc: After closing down her small-town family business a woman and her child move to the big city where an old friend offers her a job in the toy department of Wolmans. The woman realizes she must bring out the true meaning of Christmas before it’s too late.

programme.title: Movie: A Sweet Christmas Romance
programme.desc: When food stylist Holly returns home for Christmas, she learns that Loretta, the elderly owner of her favorite childhood bakery, is retiring and has started a contest to give the bakery away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Treads and Threads
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads. Forensics revealed that the killer was right under their noses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer's 'Cattle' Log
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called to retrieve a dead body, they do a background check on the victim. The trail leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Skin of Her Teeth
programme.desc: A human skull retrieved from a watery grave reveals a ghastly crime. Markings on the skull indicate deep knife wounds. The teeth had been removed from the skull, apparently so the killer could keep the victim's identity a secret.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Line of Fire
programme.desc: A fundamentalist group starts attacking and robbing banks in the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The List Murders
programme.desc: For 18 years, a man who murdered his entire family successfully eluded the FBI. Investigators used art and forensic science to find the killer and bring him to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Raw Terror
programme.desc: The story of Damion Heersink, an eleven-year-old boy who almost died after eating an improperly cooked hamburger teeming with E-Coli, and the people who saved his life.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trail of a Killer
programme.desc: A community is shocked when police discover a woman raped and murdered in broad daylight on a public trail.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gone Ballistic
programme.desc: When a middle-aged man is gunned down in his own home, the motive appears to be robbery, but a mysterious greeting card blows the investigation wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cement the Case
programme.desc: A man confesses to killing his wife, but forensic evidence may lead to another suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Innocence Lost
programme.desc: Five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in 1989. The fibers on her clothes were the only means for police to determine her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Kill'igraphy
programme.desc: A man considered unstable by his neighbors is accused of killing his wife, but the medical examiner disagrees.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nursery Crimes
programme.desc: Medical investigators have no answers as to why children at a Texas hospital are dying at a higher rate than at any other hospital until they discover that one nurse seems to be on-duty in almost all the fatal cases.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pastoral Care
programme.desc: The body of a female prison guard shows up in a landfill and investigators suspect the hundreds of prisoners in the facility where she worked.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bagging a Killer
programme.desc: Police use satellites to trace the kidnapper of a nine-year-old girl. After questioning whether the girl's long lost mother was somehow involved, the satellite tracking reveals who the kidnapper is, where they took her, and why.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Who's Your Daddy
programme.desc: A tiny clue enables police to determine where the victim had been just before she died; it would also lead them to her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Alibi
programme.desc: When 17-year-old Crystal Faye Todd was raped and murdered in her small town, one of her male acquaintances’ DNA matched semen at the crime scene. It raised the question, why would he volunteer for a DNA sample?

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Evidence
programme.desc: The shooting of a man during a hunting trip is reopened years after the incident, and the victim's hunting partner becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Formula
programme.desc: The mother of a suspiciously murdered four-month-old was convicted, but an explanation for the death would come five months later from the most unlikely of sources: his newborn brother.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Blood and Terror
programme.desc: When a gay rights activist is stabbed to death in his own apartment, police are tasked with tracking down his killer, and in the process, they uncover a dark world of paranoia and delusions lurking in the heart of London.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Fatal Fence Feud
programme.desc: Even after Lonnie Paul Tracey erected a giant barricade between him and his neighbor Tony Davis, no one ever dreamed their ongoing arguments would escalate to murder.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Lethal Brawl
programme.desc: When a mother and recovering addict is stabbed while standing up to the neighborhood bully, grainy video and unreliable witnesses stand in the way of investigators determining who was holding the knife that killed her.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Neighbors: Nightmare Next Door
programme.desc: When Jason Horsley is gunned down in front of his home, investigators discover evidence of a neighbor’s deadly plotting, but it would take six years to track the killer down.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Postal Mortem
programme.desc: On October 15, 1985, two bombs rocked Salt Lake City and resulted in two deaths. A third explosion occurred the next day, but this time the victim survived. Police believed that the survivor is more than an innocent by-stander.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Legend of the Snake King: Part 2
programme.desc: Josh finishes his investigation of the mysterious Maya city of El Mirador, from the possible burial of Snake Kings, to uncovering the secrets of the fall of one of history's greatest ancient cities.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Warrior Queen's Treasure
programme.desc: Searching across England, Josh Gates unearths a cache of ancient treasure as he chases the legend of Queen Boudica, the legendary Celtic queen who nearly defeated the invading Roman army 2,000 years ago.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Butch Cassidy's Lost Loot
programme.desc: Josh immerses himself in Wild West lore on a quest to find Butch Cassidy's missing money. He traces the iconic outlaw's footsteps through Colorado, Utah and Nevada, eventually learning that he may need to find the man himself to locate the lost loot.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Search for Florida's Lost Pirate
programme.desc: Josh Gates sets sail for Florida chasing the long-lost treasure of bloodthirsty pirate Jose Gaspar. Josh joins marine archaeologists and treasure hunters working to crack the mysteries of the pirate's life so they can find the riches he left behind.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Sub-Zero Mystery
programme.desc: Josh travels across the globe to explore the mystery of '80s cult phenomenon, the Secret. Later, Josh braves the elements of Siberia as he investigates The Dyatlov Pass Incident.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: History's Most Powerful Women
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into Egypt to uncover the final resting places of ancient history's most powerful female rulers: Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Sub-Zero Mystery
programme.desc: Josh travels across the globe to explore the mystery of '80s cult phenomenon, the Secret. Later, Josh braves the elements of Siberia as he investigates The Dyatlov Pass Incident.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: History's Most Powerful Women
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures into Egypt to uncover the final resting places of ancient history's most powerful female rulers: Nefertiti and Cleopatra.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Can You Dig It?
programme.desc: From a treacherous island prison in Ireland to a California mining town that saw more than its share of murder and mayhem, Josh digs deep to uncover the buried secrets of six legendary locations.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: What Lurks Within
programme.desc: From a lake in India with connections to alien life to a train station in Spain where a mild-mannered customs clerk took on the Nazis, Josh uncovers the mysteries of what lurks within six extraordinary locations around the globe.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crash Course
programme.desc: In Galveston County, a feisty gator needs a new home. Sneaky shrimpers try to conceal their catch. A family's property is damaged by stray bullets. On Lake Texoma, the game wardens stage a boat crash.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Red Flag
programme.desc: A landowner is spoken to for a second time about illegally hunting dove over bait. An injured deer is found hiding in a shed after being attacked. While pulling over a suspicious vehicle, the game wardens notice the driver hiding something under his seat.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stray Bullets
programme.desc: In El Paso County, teal season has just begun. An injured hog needs help in Hardin County. Galveston County fishermen are not playing by the rules. A suspicious driver is searched in Chambers County. Turtle hatchlings are released on South Padre Island.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Saving the Herd
programme.desc: Game warden Eddins assists the local police with an animal cruelty case. Game warden Richards responds to a trespassing dispute, and Game warden Roraback relocates a snapping turtle. On the coast, Game warden Bailey cracks down on fishermen.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: So Many Deer, Such Little Time
programme.desc: It's the start of hunting season, dubbed the 'Holy Day for Game Wardens.' Wardens Inman and Eddins investigate the illegal shooting of two deer. Then, Wardens Stapleton and McGee swap out bass fish in the Bois d'Arc Lake.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Thrill of the Hunt
programme.desc: A tense confrontation ensues when Wardens Scott and Gould respond to a call about an illegal deer hunting case. A pair of raccoons find their way to a gas station and must be trapped, and Warden Boone handles a disgruntled hunter.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: The Raneys make a self-automated homestead to function while firefighters Kim and Casey Boespflug are away on duty.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: My House Can Kill Me
programme.desc: Hsi Ming and Miranda are both mothers and extreme hoarders, leaving their children with little room to play.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: How Do I Get Out of This
programme.desc: Linda's hoarding escalated when her marriage began deteriorating. Now, her entire family is on the brink of collapse.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Can't Breathe
programme.desc: A single mother is on the verge of losing custody of her 10-year-old daughter as a result of years of compulsive hoarding.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: She's Going to Jail
programme.desc: Joanne's hoarding is so extreme that the city has already sent her to jail four times.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Hoo, This Reeks!
programme.desc: Kathy's extreme hoarding forced her 12-year-old son to move out of their home.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: There Are Mice Everywhere
programme.desc: Compulsive hoarder Kathleen discovers a hoard of mice living in her kitchen numbering in the thousands. And for extreme hoarder Jaime's future son-in-law, spending the night in a hoard might very well end a marriage before it even begins.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: We're Gonna Need a Bigger Boat
programme.desc: Ken's entire world revolves around his girlfriend, but as years of hoarding have taken its toll on their relationship, she's giving him one last chance to clear out. Then, Lea is at risk of losing her children if she can't clean her clutter.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: I Was Gonna Gag
programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.desc: The unsafe conditions in extreme hoarder Floyd's home have been brought to the attention of Child Protection Services. He must clear his hoard or risk losing his three-year-old son.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Noah Wyle
programme.desc: Noah Wyle investigates his maternal family line, discovering an ancestor who was catapulted into one of America's biggest wars, and whose life spiraled out of control, going from remarkable success to a shocking and tragic end.

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?: Julie Bowen
programme.desc: Julie Bowen makes a shocking discovery that a beloved relative lead a nefarious organization that triggered a dark chapter of U.S. history; and uncovers another ancestor who risked everything to fight for the lives and freedom of African Americans.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Big Fat Moves
programme.desc: Whitney finally packs up and moves to Charlotte, forcing Buddy to find a new place to live. Meanwhile, Whitney teams up with Jessica for a fitness competition from hell.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: Mom's Gonna Find Out
programme.desc: Barry and Kim leave the farm for a night to celebrate their anniversary, putting Micah and Lydia in charge. They just have one rule: Ethan and Olivia aren't allowed to visit the farm while they're away. The Plath kids party and some uninvited guests join.

programme.title: Welcome to Plathville: No Strings Attached
programme.desc: After the request for Isaac to join the band is denied by Barry and Kim, the family divide grows. Kim and Barry try to do damage control by extending a large and surprising olive branch to Ethan and Olivia. Moriah shares her desire for college.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: It Takes Two
programme.desc: Jenee has every detail set for her big day, except for the dress. Country girl Jessica has a specific vision in mind for her gown, but her sister-in-law's city taste could stand in the way. At her fitting, Leslie is still looking for her mom's approval.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Bride Overboard
programme.desc: Bride Andi and her fiancé struggle to agree on the perfect gown for their destination, sailboat wedding.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Out of Bridal Bounds
programme.desc: A sports coach loves gym attire, but her girly entourage pushes her towards something glam. Then, a bodybuilder wants a gown to show off her muscles while still looking ladylike.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Battle of the Curves
programme.desc: Trina is looking for a dress that will show off her assets, despite her Mom's conservative demands. Bride Shelby wants a gown that shows a little more skin than her traditional Dad would prefer. Bride Haley faces an extra special challenge at her fitting.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Bridesmaid Meltdown
programme.desc: A bridesmaid falls into a coma after drinking too much. A premature infant is abandoned at the hospital and must quickly be revived.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Cowboy Chaos
programme.desc: A deranged cowboy is drenched in sweat, saliva and urine and no one knows why. A metal rod is impaled into the side of a young woman's head. Two teenage girls are dangerously short of breath.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Rottweiler in the ER
programme.desc: While a shooting victim is brought to the hospital, a Rottweiler gets loose in the ER. A young mother's asthma attack turns quickly into a deadly heart failure. A young man comes into the ER comatose, covered with a mysterious rash.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: When It Rains
programme.desc: A storm strands a critical patient in the ER, but doctors can't perform the life-saving surgery he needs. Two ladies ready to hit the town end up breathless in the ER instead. A bewildered man is brought to the ER by the sheriff after reporting a theft.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dre and Casey
programme.desc: Still under lockdown, Nev and Kamie receive a request to help Dre finally meet elusive Casey. But the request is so unconventional and the situation becomes so intense that the hosts question if they should continue the search.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Robert and Ashleigh
programme.desc: After being paralyzed as a teenager, Robert met Ashleigh online and they fell in love. With news he may not have much longer to live, Robert asks Nev and Max to bring Ashleigh to him so he can find out if their love was real.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Tyreme and Tomorrow
programme.desc: Tyreme met the beautiful Tomorrow online over nine months ago. They share a deep bond and Tyreme is ready to uproot his life to be with her.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jose and Jay
programme.desc: Jasmine writes to Nev and Max asking for help for a friend that they have helped before.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Jeanette, Kiara and Patrick

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jason Ellis

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Fe-mail
programme.desc: The Joker that absolutely hates massages; and the length of time it took the make-up team to get Joe all doled up for his debut as a female techie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Chairman
programme.desc: The guys shock their fellow shoppers by going footloose and fancy free in a discount store, then pose insane questions to strangers in the park. Tonight's loser is taken for the ride of his life in a tricked out wheelchair he can't possibly control.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Scarytales
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Butt of the Joker
programme.desc: The guys pair up in focus group presentations, and tonight's loser tries to cure the public of a nasty habit, but gets people smoking mad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Takes the Cake
programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Indecent Proposal
programme.desc: Find out why Murr had to shave in under three minutes between scenes of That Ain't Me, what the Jokers love most about Writers Blocked, and where Sal ranks his indecent dance instructor punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Crypto-Crush
programme.desc: Interns must hack their way into a new soda flavor as they watch videos of a bat nightclub, a drunk Santa bike ride, and an inappropriate way to open champagne.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Running of the Bullies
programme.desc: Find out which Joker's waiter experience made meal or no meal a breeze, why there was a white noise machine needed during dust bunnies and who issued a siren warning right after Sal's pool punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Got the Bug Out
programme.desc: Posing as a technician, Michael literally 'gets the bug out' of a customer's phone and has him convinced it was in there all along. Then, as a bartender, he makes patrons fall for a never-ending beer bottle and a shot that breaks the laws of physics.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Problem With Chocolate Turtles and Seeds
programme.desc: Posing as a cashier, Michael makes a shopper's face appear on a milk carton and tries to convince her that she really is a missing person.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Waddle, a Scratch.....
programme.desc: Posing as a thrift store employee, Michael makes shoppers believe that a real waddling duck is just a lifelike decoy, and confuses clerks with a never-ending chain of hangers. Then, he convinces liquor store customers that some corks are made of cheese.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Welcome to Miami

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Below the Belt

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: Got the Bug Out

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Inside Carbonaro: This Is Not An Orange

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Seeing Stars and Stripes
programme.desc: It's summertime in Texas. Game Wardens handle a speeding jet ski, drunk boaters, angry campers, and a rowdy raccoon.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Fawn Stars
programme.desc: In Liberty County, the death of a deer is investigated. Fawns in Harris County are being illegally kept as pets. Patrol on Somerville Lake leads to multiple citations. A suspicious car is stopped in Red River County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Panhandle Poachers
programme.desc: Warden Marshall leads the charge on a poaching investigation. Warden Richards visits an allegedly illegal snake breeder. Wardens Gould and Hickerson try to save an injured pelican, while Warden Miller brings a caracara bird to rehab.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Crossing the Line
programme.desc: With oyster season in full swing, Texas game wardens ensure everyone is following the rules on land and water. Hunters are investigated for trespassing on private property. The game wardens find an oyster boat deckhand with several warrants.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Illegal Operations
programme.desc: Officer Bronson investigates a claim that an illegal deer kill was an accident. Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident, while Officer Holmes and McDermott join forces to run a decoy operation and a moose gets a wellness check from Sgt. Lucas.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Circle of Life
programme.desc: Officer Crouse responds to a call about a nuisance raccoon, while Officer Towne searches for a deer attacked by coyotes. Officer Hannett monitors a suspicious fisherman and Officer St. Pierre responds to a call about an impaired driver.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Hawk about the House
programme.desc: When humans live so close to wildlife incidents are bound to happen. In this episode a baby deer is need of help from the conservations officers, and a homeowner calls up when a hawk stages a break-in at her home.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Life on the Border
programme.desc: Up in the North Woods along the Canadian border, things are very different. A warden looking for smugglers encounters a drunk driver with a gun, and a suicidal man enters the woods with a shotgun.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A new class of wardens are being trained to do search and rescues. A hiker vanishes on the Appalachian trail and the wardens lead one of the largest search and rescue operations in Maine's history to find her.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed 2
programme.desc: A look back at the most exciting moments and never-before-seen stories.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Man vs. Animal
programme.desc: As winter melts into spring, all kinds of wildlife are emerging, from baby raccoons to hungry black bears. A routine littering summons turns into a face off with a rabid pitbull. Some new evidence comes to light to revive an old deer poaching case.

programme.title: Snapped: Joanna McElrath
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a fellow officer plunges detectives into a cavern of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Cole
programme.desc: A suspicious fire hides a deadly secret and forces a son to testify against his only remaining parent.

programme.title: Snapped: Laurie Jean Cone

programme.title: Snapped: Lateisha Jandreau

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Keep Your Friends Close
programme.desc: New Jersey teenager Sarah Stern disappears, and cops look to her family and friends for clues. They discover that some of those closest to her may not have been all they seemed, unravelling a tale of misplaced trust and deadly greed.

programme.title: Injustice With Nancy Grace: Killer in the Weeds
programme.desc: A young woman's body is found by her own father, in a park near their home in Queens. After DNA evidence helps the NYPD lock in on a suspect, a judge's decision to suppress evidence leads to a mistrial, jeopardizing a possible conviction.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Lady in a Barrel

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Wishing Well Hell

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Bread & Breakfast & Body
programme.desc: Investigators believe a young woman went missing on her own accord, but her mother is convinced that someone close to her is hiding a big secret. A two-year search for the truth brings investigators to the backyard of a historic location.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Murder House
programme.desc: While attempting to identify the remains of a victim found buried in the backyard of a plush California home, investigators uncover a mystery with an unsettling truth: another murder was committed at the exact same residence, thirty years earlier.

programme.title: Buried in the Backyard: Buried in the Woods: Deadly Premonition
programme.desc: Life looks bright for a new college graduate. But when her beloved car is found abandoned, investigators race to find the missing girl. Weeks later, a psychic comes forward delivering unforeseen answers and an appalling twist no one sees coming.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawn Silvernail
programme.desc: The murder of a church choir member uncovers a sordid secret and an unlikely love triangle.

programme.title: Snapped: Karen Newell
programme.desc: A roadside shooting leaves one man dead and exposes his wife’s wild double life.

programme.title: Snapped: Jackie Postma
programme.desc: A murder in an isolated parking lot leads to betrayal, multiple suspects and a lot of finger-pointing.

programme.title: Movie: Searching

programme.title: Movie: Mechanic: Resurrection
programme.desc: Arthur Bishop has finally retired as a contract killer and settled down with the love of his life. When he turns down a contract, the employer kidnaps her. In order to save her, Arthur must complete three impossible assassinations of dangerous men.

programme.title: Movie: White Boy Rick

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: A Fish Called Tina

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Wag the Song

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Yurty Rotten Scoundrels

programme.title: Impossible Fixes: Ice Bridge Nightmare
programme.desc: A determined team of expert technicians battle nature's destructive force to keep one of the world's longest road bridges open in deadly conditions.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mafia Ghost Ship
programme.desc: A ghost ship with links to the mob suddenly appears on a California beach. Strange markings could be a coded message that reveals a plot to overthrow the Queen of England. A lake believed to have magical healing powers holds clues to life on Mars.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of the Mummy Desert
programme.desc: New evidence could reveal the remains of an ancient Roman city thought to be lost forever. Strange images from a remote and empty desert could explain the mysterious mummies found there. An apocalyptic sandstorm swallows the Middle East.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Mystery of Fang Forest
programme.desc: A strange forest of razor-sharp stones could be home of an undiscovered Hobbit-like humanoid species. When a man-made island mysteriously appears off the US coast, grisly new evidence points to secret government experiments into psycho-chemical warfare.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Who Built Supervillain Island?
programme.desc: A satellite spots a set of huge arrows in the badlands of the American west. A blood red waterfall stains Antarctica's snows. A plague of huge holes in the Siberian landscape.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Village of the Damned
programme.desc: A forbidden island points to a strange South American town that locals claim was the home of Adolf Hitler. New data from NASA satellites might reveal a sunken lost continent in the Indian Ocean. A pit of bodies suggests fears of a zombie nightmare.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: America's Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: A strange creature like the Loch Ness Monster is recorded in America. Experts analyze evidence of a giant scaly egg, and some wonder if it belongs to a dragon. Birds are suddenly vaporized by an invisible death ray.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Incident at Area 51
programme.desc: Near Area 51, a police convoy is filmed transporting an alien-looking craft in the dead of night. When strange beams of light are reported in Argentina, experts investigate if it's proof of a terrifying Nazi superweapon.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: It Came From the Fog
programme.desc: When a mysterious fog and a huge explosion strike at once, some suspect a napalm attack on American soil, but using cutting-edge technology, experts find that the truth could be more dangerous than ever imagined.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Man Who Laid an Egg
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a man who appears to lay an egg, some experts wonder if it's evidence that scientists created a human-reptile mutant through gene manipulation. Using cutting-edge tech, investigators put this horrifying theory to the test.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Deadlift
programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: See No Evil: Don't Get in the Truck
programme.desc: On February 18th 2014, Emily Lambert goes missing after spending the night at a hotel bar with her new boyfriend. Two days later, she's found murdered on remote farmland. Detectives scour CCTV footage from the hotel and bar searching for her killer.

programme.title: See No Evil: On Her Watch
programme.desc: On March 18th, 2011, 32-year-old Patty Ayala is murdered at the Burger King where she works. Police find the safe open and a mysterious message next to Patty's body. They turn to surveillance video - and it's there the killer emerges from the shadows.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?

programme.desc: In California, a doorbell camera captures a disoriented woman trying to break into a home as the terrified homeowner prepares to protect herself. And, in Texas, a panicked woman with restraints on her arms rings a doorbell in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Searching for Sherri
programme.desc: A young mother vanishes while out jogging. A frantic search is mounted. Then, just as suddenly, three weeks later she reappears, battered and bruised and her long blond hair chopped off.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Knock, Knock, Who's There?
programme.desc: In California, a doorbell camera captures a disoriented woman trying to break into a home as the terrified homeowner prepares to protect herself. And, in Texas, a panicked woman with restraints on her arms rings a doorbell in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral: Don't Mess With Me
programme.desc: A mother is inside a gas station when a man steals her car, with her 13-year-old and 6-month old daughters inside. Then, when a waitress is sexually assaulted, she takes matters into her own hands, attacking her assaulter.

programme.title: Chaos in Court: Fit of Rage
programme.desc: A former basketball star sentenced for abusing a girlfriend; an inmate shoots two deputies dead; a defendant throws chairs; a sex offender attacks a prosecutor; a man leapfrogs his way out of court; and a Rastafarian pot smoker lost in translation.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: Murder in Aspen
programme.desc: Aspen heiress Nancy Pfister had a taste for adventure, and a knack for making friends from all walks of life. But when her lifeless body was found in the closet of her home, many wondered if freewheeling Nancy had taken one chance too many.

programme.title: The Murder Tapes: Is That Blood?
programme.desc: When devoted mother Danielle Pruett goes missing in Tazewell, Virginia, police launch an investigation to find her. When her lifeless body is discovered in an open field, what starts as a web of lies and deceit becomes a race to track her killer.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Blood in the Barn

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Into the Wild
programme.desc: While out for a run in the Montana wilderness, 22-year-old college student Kari Swensen is taken prisoner by two mountain men. When she learns of their twisted plans for her, she'll do everything she can to escape or die trying.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: Mother and Son
programme.desc: A young mother and her twelve-year-old son are brutally assaulted and strangled to death in a quiet New Brunswick town. It's a true whodunit and an intensely personal case for Detective Gerry Belliveau.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The Long Walk Home
programme.desc: When 17 year-old Jennifer Teague goes missing, her community is stunned. Detective Greg Brown turns to the town to help him find her killer.

programme.title: The Case That Haunts Me: The House Hermit
programme.desc: The investigation into the deaths of a Toronto couple leads a detective to uncover a pattern of escalating crimes that suggest a serial killer is operating in cottage country.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Breaking Point
programme.desc: A successful young attorney is gunned down in his own home. The shooter? His on-again, off-again girlfriend, a beautiful, young graduate student. She says it was self-defense. Police say it was something else.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: Delve into real-life crime and justice cases, examining them from all angles.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Fitbit Alibi
programme.desc: Nicole Vander Heyden was found dead in a field after a night on the town with friends. After police interviewed her boyfriend, he became their prime suspect. Data recorded about his activities on his Fitbit told a different story than he told police.

programme.title: 48 Hours: The Case Against Brooke Skylar Richardson
programme.desc: The parents of Brooke Skylar Richardson speak out. The real story behind the international headlines in the case of an alleged unthinkable crime.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Rise of the Patriots
programme.desc: Five unsung patriots strike pivotal blows for American liberty as unrest between Britain and the colonies explodes into a war for independence.

programme.title: The American Revolution: The Empire Fights Back
programme.desc: Time after time, American independence seems like a lost cause as George Washington's Continental Army teeters on the brink of annihilation. The heroics of five little-known patriots help the colonies live to fight another day.

programme.title: The American Revolution: Return of the Rebels
programme.desc: The American Revolution seems doomed as the British army launches a bold new campaign in the south, but five unsung patriots help reverse the course of the war and shock the world.

programme.title: American Titans: Carnegie vs. Frick
programme.desc: Steel magnate Andrew Carnegie and coal king Henry Clay Frick join forces to dominate America's second industrial revolution. Their wealthy empire will crush rivals, destroy the labor movement, and ignite a bitter feud between titans that ends in violence.

programme.title: American Titans: Rockefeller vs. Scott
programme.desc: John D. Rockefeller, the young new king of kerosene, and Thomas A. Scott, the visionary behind the Pennsylvania Railroad Company, battle for control of America's new oil industry.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Code Wars
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. Now, with encryption available for technological devices, U.S. code warriors have a new obstacle to manuever in exposing their enemies.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Guns
programme.desc: The guns used in modern warfare are a terrifying fusion of unparalleled accuracy, range and stopping power. Take an inside look at the most ubiquitous and fundamental assets on the battlefield.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Helicopters
programme.desc: A superior aerial force changes the stakes of any battle. Take a look at some of the fastest, deadliest attack helicopters soaring over combat zones today.

programme.title: Deadliest Tech: Fighters
programme.desc: America's fighter planes are renowned as the world's deadliest and most dominant aerial assassins. Explore the top fighters ever, and look at what the future holds.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Rangers Lead the Way
programme.desc: United States Army Rangers spearhead one of the biggest amphibious landings in history: the Allied invasion of France. They must scale vertical cliffs before facing the enemy, then destroy the guns that threaten to blow the Allied forces out of the water.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Hitler's Last Bridge
programme.desc: A brave band of regular GI's are tasked with saving the last bridge and final gateway to the Third Reich. The bridge is bristling with German guns loaded with explosives. Worse, the enemy plan to destroy the bridge if the American unit assaults it.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Epic Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, with the Bowery Boys as rivals.

programme.title: WWII: Masters of War: Adolf Hitler
programme.desc: On June 22, 1941, Adolf Hitler launches the largest military offensive in history against the Soviet Union: Operation Barbarossa. Blinded by his fire power, Hitler signs his death sentence.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: The Industry of War
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to rebuild Germany's military strength after the destruction of almost all its weaponry in the First World War. To overcome his country's dire shortage of raw materials, he plans to steal them from other countries.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.desc: A showcase of gourmet food for holiday entertaining or for gift giving.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Building Hope
programme.desc: Ingrid was in the process of converting a small cottage into a modern home when she suffered an aneurysm and two strokes. Her daughter took over, but needs Mike's help.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son renovate his home so he and his girlfriend can start a family.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: My Life Is in Your Hands
programme.desc: Three new couples challenge the Alaskan elements. Mike and Kathleen Kondus build atop a windy tundra, first-time builders Mike and Teresa Oldenkamp construct a complex cabin and Paige Drobny and Cody Strathe create a dog-training facility on haunted land.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Life of Near Misses
programme.desc: Paige and Cody realize they don't have the correct insulation for their log walls. Kathleen and Mike's team get dangerously high up to install the ridge beam. Mike and Teresa begin work on their floor, but discover the joists are not evenly spaced.

programme.title: Building Alaska: I Need Five Hands
programme.desc: Paige and Cody's build takes a hit after Sterling and Joe leave the site and a trailer full of vital materials breaks down. The foundation is sinking at Mike and Teresa's cabin while Kathleen and Mike Kondus watch part of their cabin begin to crumble.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Absolutely Insane
programme.desc: The Konduses fight the rain and shattered window panes deep in the White Mountains. Mike and Teresa's team gets stuck on slippery scaffolding 19 feet in the air while Paige and Cody's build stalls thanks to a material ordering snafu near the deadline.

programme.title: Building Alaska: It's Gonna Be Plush
programme.desc: It's a race to the finish as Paige and Cody wrap up before dog racing season in Cantwell while Mike and Kathleen lose all their help deep in the White Mountains. Meanwhile, the Oldenkamps struggle with the challenges of working on a grain-bin-style cabin.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Tiny Craftsman
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley revisit a house they tried to purchase a year ago and find the small 1920s craftsman has been stripped of all its original features.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Spiced, Salty and Succulent
programme.desc: Michael heads to Austin for barbecue sandwich that has the entire town line up. In Jersey City, a chef concocts his own sweet and spicy burger creation. In Louisville, KY, Michael washes down a pastrami spiced sandwich with a refreshing local dessert.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Decadent Regional Dishes
programme.desc: Baton Rouge, La. native and Food Network Star finalist, Jay Ducote, joins Michael Symon for a French and Cajun-inspired burger with a twist.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Dangerously Good Eats
programme.desc: Chef Michael Symon sinks his teeth into a burger in Memphis, Tenn., that's so dangerously good, innocent bystanders had better beware! Then pizza gets a brunch makeover in Atlanta with creamy scrambled eggs and crispy pancetta.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Beastly Burgers
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets things started in Boston where a whole smoked hog is getting the royal treatment with a marinade injection, a salt crust and a foil wrap for crispy skin. Then in Phoenix, a wolf of a burger gets topped with smoked pulled pork.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: When Harry Met Salad
programme.desc: Noah Cappe's first stop is the Wayne County Fair in Richmond, Ind., where he takes a stroll with the Walking BBQ, feels the groove of the King with a bacon PB&J quesadilla, goes healthy-ish with a deep fried salad.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Camp Pop
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to northern Indiana, where the Hoosiers in Valparaiso are doing things right at the Porter County Fair. The Super Ramen Dog combines two delicious foods Noah didn't know belonged together, the Elephant Ear Taco.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Click on the Link
programme.desc: Whether they're long links, plump patties or spicy little slices, everyone loves sausage and we're sampling the best the US has to offer. Start off by checking out a chorizo burger in Jacksonville, Florida, and getting down on a sausage sampler.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Meals Over Miami
programme.desc: Get ready to dance with the diverse flavors that color in mouthwatering Miami. There's a papita-topped Cuban street food favorite, a pepper-packed burger that brings the heat, bold burritos, decadent mac 'n' cheese and more.

programme.title: Food Paradise: Flavor Fiesta!
programme.desc: From spicy Chilean pork ribs in the Pacific Northwest to a Puerto Rican pork-tacular down in Georgia, diners are finding south-of-the-border flavor without ever leaving the States.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Asian Sensations
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe looks east for inspiration as he explores Asian flavours on the fairgrounds. From classic foods like shrimp fried rice balls at the Pacific national exhibition and the spicy Kaprao burger.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Toronto
programme.desc: Jordan Andino is exploring the culinary delights of Toronto, Canada's most diverse city.

programme.title: Late Nite Eats: Montreal
programme.desc: Jordan Andino explores the Montreal food scene and it doesn't disappoint. He heads to Notre Dame de Grace to try the late night discount menu at Monkland Tavern. Jordan falls in love with the braised calamari caponata.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Pizza
programme.desc: Roger Mooking presents the top fifteen pizza offerings in the whole country.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hamburgers
programme.desc: The deceptively simple ground meat served on a bun with the perfect combo of condiments and garnishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: Roger Mooking follows the smoke signals to two Texas restaurants. At Bin Tapas Bar in San Antonio, Texas, Roger and Chef Jason Dady cook a giant pan of paella flavored with Thai ingredients and cooked over a wood burning fire.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Monster Meat
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to Hoodoo Brown Barbeque in Ridgefield, CT, where owner Cody Sperry serves up monster-sized meaty masterpieces. Cody serves up "outlaw barbeque," a mashup of styles and traditions with smoke pork butts, pork ribs, pork belly and beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ for Breakfast
programme.desc: Roger visits two Texas pit masters who give breakfast a wake-up call by adding barbecue. Reid Guess smoked his first brisket when he was just 7 years old, and built his first smoker when he was in 7th grade.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Taste of Texas
programme.desc: The smoke signals lead Roger to two popular food trucks in Texas serving up delicious ethnic eats. In Grapevine, Texas, Roger meets Pit Master Trey Sánchez of Vaqueros Bar-B-Q who is known for combining authentic Texas-style barbecue with Mexican dishes.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Hawaiian Heat and Texas Meat
programme.desc: Roger heads to the Aloha State where Chef Lee Anne Wong fires up a custom-made stainless-steel shelving unit with local kiawe wood and prepares a tropical feast of succulent beer-can chicken, slow-roasted fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hogs and Dogs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe sets sail for The Great Frederick Fair in Maryland, where he goes all in for The Whole Hog, finds his sea legs with The Crabby Dog, rounds out his plate with Cake-a-Dilla and dances for joy with the Hula Boat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Feast and Fries
programme.desc: At the Paris Fair in Ontario, Canada, Noah Cappe ponders a meat pie poutine. At the Washington County Fair in New York he taps into sugar shack cotton candy.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Souperman
programme.desc: Noah Cappe ventures to the land of cheese for the Wisconsin State Fair and is greeted with the ooey-gooey French Onion Soup'r Stick.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jackie Hash Brown
programme.desc: Noah Cappe makes a visit to the world-famous Iowa State Fair to sample some award-winning new items. There's a new take on chicken and waffles and a massive meat meal all wrapped up to eat on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: It's A Wonderful Bite
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to California for some holiday magic at Winter Fest OC, where there are lots of treats for all the good boys and girls.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Postman Always Brings Rice
programme.desc: Host Noah Cappe heads to Hawaii for the Maui Fair where rice is always on the menu. He enjoys traditional Hawaiian treats like the Laulau Feast and Loco Moco and cross-cultural favs like Furikake Salmon.

programme.title: Movie: Cowboys and Aliens
programme.desc: The Wild West and Outer Space collide when a spaceship lands with the intention of taking over the world in 1873. Sophisticated technology and human ingenuity clash as a group of cowboys and natives fight to thwart the aliens' plans of world domination.

programme.title: Movie: Flags of Our Fathers
programme.desc: The iconic photograph of American soldiers raising the flag on the island of Iwo Jima after the devastating battle leads to dramatic crises of conscience for the survivors involved.

programme.title: The Undoing
programme.desc: Grace Fraser becomes intrigued by a young mother at her son's school. Later, news of a tragedy rocks the school community.

programme.title: The Undoing: The Missing
programme.desc: A successful therapist's life is upended by terrible revelations about her spouse.

programme.title: Movie: Black Christmas
programme.desc: One by one, sorority girls at Hawthorne College are being hunted and killed by an unknown stalker.

programme.title: David Byrne's American Utopia
programme.desc: 'David Byrne’s American Utopia' brings the Talking Heads frontman’s critically acclaimed Broadway show to HBO in a one-of-a-kind film.

programme.title: We Are Who We Are
programme.desc: Two American children living on a military base in Italy grow up together.

programme.title: The Perfect Weapon
programme.desc: 'The Perfect Weapon' explores the rise of cyber conflict as the primary way nations now compete with and sabotage one another.

programme.title: Movie: The Pledge
programme.desc: Upon retiring, a Nevada sheriff vows to a woman that he will catch the person who murdered her young daughter. Convinced the police have the wrong guy, he pursues a hunch up in a mountain town and ends up befriending a local woman and her child.

programme.title: Movie: People Like Us
programme.desc: After his father dies, a young man discovers that he has a half-sister and a nephew. He sets out to meet them and deliver them their inheritance.

programme.title: Movie: Flight of the Phoenix
programme.desc: A group of oil workers become stranded in the Mongolian desert after their plane crashes. They must deal with destructive natural elements, vicious smugglers and each other, all while rebuilding their plane. The plane is their only chance at survival.

programme.title: Movie: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: The Crawley family and their household continue the story begun in the series of the same name. It is now 1927, and the King and Queen of England are planning a visit to the Crawleys' country estate.

programme.title: Movie: Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw
programme.desc: A government agent and a former assassin work together to stop a genetically enhanced villain who intends to unleash a supervirus.

programme.title: Movie: Emma
programme.desc: A woman meddles in her friends' love lives.

programme.title: Real Sports With Bryant Gumbel
programme.desc: Goes beyond the scores and statistics to present a critical look at the world of sports.

programme.title: Movie: 21 Bridges
programme.desc: In an attempt to capture ruthless cop killers, an NYPD detective shuts down the city's bridges.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Castle
programme.desc: A celebrated general is sent to a military prison where he challenges an unjust warden.

programme.title: Stephen Colbert's Election Night 2020: Democracy's Last Stand
programme.desc: Stephen Colbert and guests react in real-time to the election results.

programme.title: Movie: Red
programme.desc: A retired black-ops agent brings his old team back together in an attempt to uncover the assailants that attacked him in his home.

programme.title: Movie: Shaft
programme.desc: A detective must track down the only eyewitness who can put away all of his enemies.

programme.title: Desus & Mero: THIS IS LIGHTHEARTED FUN THAT WE HAVIN' RIGHT NOW
programme.desc: The hosts welcome Chris Rock.

programme.title: Inside the NFL: 2020 Week 8
programme.desc: Presents exclusive NFL highlights of every football game from the previous week.

programme.title: Movie: Dazed and Confused
programme.desc: In 1976, high school seniors and freshmen celebrate the newfound freedom of summer.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Summer Nights
programme.desc: A teen sent to stay with his aunt in Cape Cod for the summer struggles to fit in, but after a chance encounter with a small-time drug dealer he begins selling drugs to other teens, using his brains to help grow his new partner's illicit operation.

programme.title: Movie: Countdown
programme.desc: After downloading a new, deadly app, a young nurse has only three days to live.

programme.title: Movie: Morris From America
programme.desc: When 13-year-old Morris is moved to Germany by his father, he thinks life can't get any worse. Working on his dream of becoming a rapper, his life is turned around when he meets and falls for Inka. With her help, he learns about himself and his dream.

programme.title: Movie: Apollo 13
programme.desc: The true story of how the crew of the ill-fated Apollo 13 moon mission averted tragedy with skill and determination.

programme.title: Movie: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: An aspiring Navy pilot undergoes an emotional transformation during his time at boot camp.

programme.title: Movie: Dangerous Liaisons
programme.desc: In 18th century France, an aristocrat schemes to have her ex-lover seduce a pious woman.

programme.title: Movie: Your Sister's Sister
programme.desc: A young man mourning the death of his brother and a young woman recovering from a breakup become involved.

programme.title: Movie: The Fog
programme.desc: One hundred years ago, lepers were refused refuge in a small town and were burned to death. The ghosts of the lepers later return to exact revenge on the descendents of those who refused them, using a mysterious fog.

programme.title: Movie: Van Helsing
programme.desc: A famed monster hunter must battle Count Dracula, the Wolf Man and Frankenstein's Monster.

programme.title: Movie: Driven
programme.desc: After being busted for smuggling, a man has a chance at redemption in an affluent suburb. With the FBI breathing down his neck and his finances in shambles, things are about to take a turn. Based on a real celebrity scandal.

programme.title: Movie: Good Will Hunting
programme.desc: A math genius with a dubious past is discovered working as a janitor at a prestigious university. An esteemed professor agrees to take him under his wing with the condition that he gets therapy to work through his problems.

programme.title: Movie: Intolerable Cruelty
programme.desc: A divorce lawyer meets his match when he falls for the gold-digger he defeated in court.

programme.title: Movie: Lost Transmissions
programme.desc: A young songwriter attempts desperately to help her schizophrenic friend, a prominent music producer that refuses to take his medication.

programme.title: Movie: Hope Springs
programme.desc: A middle-aged couple decides to attend a week long counselling session after 30 years of marriage.

programme.title: Movie: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: When a systems engineer blows the whistle on a dangerous technology, Charlie's Angels from across the globe are called into action, putting their lives on the line to protect society.

programme.title: Movie: Planes
programme.desc: A crop dusting plane dreams of becoming a world famous air racer.

programme.title: Movie: Planes: Fire and Rescue
programme.desc: When a world-famous air racer sustains engine damage, he accepts that it's time for a career change. He learns the true meaning of heroism when he lends his skills to the elite team of firefighting aircraft that battle raging wildfires.

programme.title: Movie: Anger Management
programme.desc: A mild-mannered man is ordered to seek treatment from an unusual anger management specialist.

programme.title: Movie: Jarhead
programme.desc: Two snipers are shipped out to the Middle East for the Gulf War and fight in Desert Storm.

programme.title: Seduced: Inside the NXIVM Cult: Enslaved
The River and the Wall
programme.desc: Five friends embark on a 1,200 mile journey along the US-Mexico border from El Paso to the Gulf of Mexico to learn first hand what effect a border wall will have on the natural landscape and the wild animals roaming the land.

programme.title: Movie: A Godwink Christmas
programme.desc: Two people find their paths continuing to cross over the holidays at Martha's Vineyard.

programme.title: Movie: Matchmaker Santa
programme.desc: A baker's romantic holiday plans with her workaholic boyfriend go awry when a chance meeting with a mysterious Santa strands her and her boyfriend's best friend in a charming small town.

programme.title: Movie: Fir Crazy
programme.desc: A recently unemployed woman steps in to run her family's Christmas tree farm after her father suffers an injury. She finds herself in a battle with a new business that no longer wants to host the Christmas tree lot.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas on My Mind
programme.desc: A woman wakes up from a dream, holding a wedding dress, and assuming she is about to marry her fiancée. Only, that dream, ended two years before, and she has no idea who her current fiancée is.

programme.title: Movie: Holly and Ivy
programme.desc: After her neighbour's illness returns, a woman looks for someone to renovate her house so she can adopt her children.

programme.title: Movie: Just in Time for Christmas
programme.desc: A woman must choose between moving across the country for her dream job or staying in her hometown to marry the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Visitor
programme.desc: A visitor enters the lives of grieving parents to help them remember the joy of Christmas.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Song
programme.desc: When two high school music teacher face losing their jobs due to budget cuts, their fate is to be decided in a televised city-wide Christmas carol contest.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Wonderland
programme.desc: An artist is forced to put her life on hold and return home to help her family. While at home, she finds herself working closely with her high-school sweetheart who is desperately searching for a home for his school's Christmas dance.

programme.title: Movie: Deliver by Christmas
programme.desc: A bakery owner is enchanted by a mystery client whom she has never met.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Encore
programme.desc: A struggling actress is cast in her last off Broadway show before giving up on her dream and moving home.

programme.title: Movie: A Homecoming for the Holidays
programme.desc: A country-singer returns home for the holidays and meets her brother's friend, an ex-soldier. While home, she works on her new song, plus, spends time with the friend to help him build a house.

programme.title: Sesame Street: Elmo the Engineer

programme.desc: A fellowship created to destroy an ancient ring of power is fractured. Part of the group continues the journey to Mount Doom to destroy the ring, while the remainder joins forces with an Elvin army to help defend a keep against an evil army's onslaught.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Michael's Band
programme.desc: Michael accepts an invitation to play in his friend's band, but he's gotten rusty.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: The Lady Is Not a Tramp
programme.desc: Michael's imagination runs wild when he finds a package of condoms in Claire's backpack.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Of Mice and Men
programme.desc: Michael is determined to handle their mouse problem himself without an exterminator.

programme.title: Martin: Break Up (Part Three)

programme.desc: Martin and a friend find themselves in big trouble after committing credit card fraud.

programme.title: Martin: Jerome's in the House

programme.title: Movie: Coming to America
programme.desc: An African prince travels to America to avoid an arranged marriage and find a new bride.

programme.title: Movie: White Men Can't Jump

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Those Were the Days

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Vying for Attention
programme.desc: Will becomes childishly jealous when his mother arrives for a visit with a new boyfriend.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Hot Cocoa Bang Bang

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: BFFs

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Yemen Party
programme.desc: When Donna joins a women's support group and complains about how Cleveland treats her, he dresses as a woman to infiltrate the group. Meanwhile, Cleveland Jr. and Rallo join forces to stop Rodney, the bully.

programme.title: The Cleveland Show: Skip Day
programme.desc: Cleveland is embarrassed when he learns that Cleveland Jr. was the only student to attend school on 'skip day.' Meanwhile, Rallo gets into a hit-and-run accident with Kendra and her scooter.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Free Wally
programme.desc: Shawn and Lisa's romantic cruise is wonderful, except for an annoying stowaway.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: My Fair Marlon
programme.desc: Shawn helps Marlon woo a sophisticated woman, but complications develop.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Pops Moves In
programme.desc: When Pops moves in with Shawn and Marlon, it's just like when they were kids, a little too much so.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Afro Cab
programme.desc: Shawn and Marlon start their own taxi company but soon find a few roadblocks to success.

programme.title: Martin: Your Arms Are Too Short to Box With Martin
programme.desc: Martin and Cole try to avenge a beating given to Tommy by Shannon's ex and his friends.

programme.title: Martin: Baby You Can Drive My Car
programme.desc: The gang all chip in for a raffle ticket and they win a brand new SUV.

programme.title: Martin: Variety Show
programme.desc: Martin is chosen to produce a charity show, but lets the power go to his head.

programme.title: Martin: Checks, Lies and Videotape
programme.desc: A crooked preacher cons thousands of dollars from churchgoers, so Martin and Gina try to catch his confession on video.

programme.title: Living Single: The Engagement
programme.desc: Overton's marriage proposal to Synclaire is thwarted by a mugger who steals the ring.

programme.title: Living Single: The Engagement
programme.desc: Overton retrieved the stolen engagement ring from police and slips it on Synclaire's hand.

programme.title: Living Single: Ride the Maverick
programme.desc: Max fights back against her political opponent's smear tactics in the race for alderman.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act
programme.desc: A lounge singer witnesses a murder by her mobster boyfriend and hides out in a convent.

programme.title: Movie: Sister Act 2: Back in the Habit
programme.desc: Lounge singer Deloris returns to the convent to help choral students save their school.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Moving on Out
programme.desc: After deciding he can't take living in the garage anymore, Jr. looks for an apartment.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Candy Wars
programme.desc: Michael's competitive spirit gets the best of him when he helps Kady with her candy drive.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids: Jr. Sells His Car
programme.desc: Jr. surprises everyone when he decides to sell the car that he painstakingly restored.

programme.title: Movie: Double Holiday
programme.desc: A woman is tasked with throwing her companies holiday party, with her nemesis. The two must work together to mingle work and traditions to make the party a success.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Next Door
programme.desc: The author of bachelor lifestyle books, is left in charge of his young niece and nephew for the holidays.

programme.title: Movie: One Royal Holiday
programme.desc: A woman offers stranded family a place to stay during a blizzard. Unbeknownst to her, they are members of a royal family. Despite their different backgrounds, the woman shows her guests what a small-town Christmas is all about.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: The Mistletoe Secret
programme.desc: A woman has big hopes for her town's big holiday adventure, until she meets the man behind the plan.

programme.title: Movie: Entertaining Christmas
programme.desc: A cookbook author's daughter is set to take over the family business. Only problem is, she can't cook. When she sees an online video asking for help, she is determined to change the family ways, and become known for helping in other ways.

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas
programme.desc: A restless young married woman is granted a wish by a Christmas Angel to be single again. She soon realizes that her new life isn't what she bargained for and embarks on a quest to win her husband back.

programme.title: Movie: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: An accident between a sweet bookshop worker and a handsome stranger leaves him without his memory.

programme.title: Movie: A Christmas Love Story
programme.desc: A youth-choir director is tasked with writing the title song for her Christmas Eve show but becomes distracted when a gifted boy joins the choir. Unbeknownst to her, this boy does not tell his widowed father of his plans to sing in the service.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Actress Lucia Micarelli from Hallmark Movies and Mysteries original movie, 'The Christmas Bow.' 'Shark Tank' star Robert Herjavec.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
programme.desc: A single mother who's lost all interest in Christmas finds just what she needs when her uncle comes to visit.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: The Office: Branch Wars
programme.desc: Karen tries to woo Stanley away from Scranton, and Michael fights back by dragging her ex into the war.

programme.title: The Office: Survivor Man

programme.title: The Office: The Deposition
